_template_source: Mirrors aporia/docs/staged_substrate_blocks/2026-05-13/ingest_summary_template.json (gitignored scaffold); batch-specific fields adapted to today's EC rank corpus rather than yesterday's GL(3) Maass form + AA-013 corpus
below_inclusion_threshold_reason: total_ingested=2 < 5 AND high-trust=2 ≥ 2 BUT total < 5 still fails the inclusion gate per spec §3.2 (need both total ≥ 5 AND high-trust ≥ 2); pilot smoke-test batch, not v1.0 corpus contribution

learner_records_sampled.routing_note: Rank ≤ 1 stratum, unconditional via mwrank + 2-descent (Kolyvagin equating analytic and algebraic rank); routes to promoted/decidable, eligible as unconditional ground-truth target

Rank ≥ 2 or Tate-Shafarevich non-trivial stratum, conditional on BSD/Parity Conjecture if descent doesn't unconditionally terminate; caveat preserved in sidecar.caveats; downstream consumer should second-gate on BSD-conditional records before using as unconditional eval target

routing_checks_notes.ml_predicted_path_untested: No ml_predicted blocks in today's batch (both are high-trust). The ml_predicted→survived/conditional path was exercised yesterday (2026-05-13) on anchor-maass_gl3-001; today exercises the complementary path (analytically_proven + numerically_certified → promoted/decidable).
routing_checks_notes.bs_coverage_field_recognized_when_presen: Neither block carries explicit bs_coverage; v1.0.0 emitters. Regex fallback correctly returned empty for both (EC rank not in BS-001..BS-006). v1.1 explicit-bs_coverage path remains untested at runtime.
routing_checks_notes.bsd_conditional_caveat_preserved_in_side: anchor-ec_rank-002's caveats field 'May rely conditionally on the Birch and Swinnerton-Dyer conjecture or the Parity Conjecture if descent machinery does not unconditionally terminate' is preserved verbatim in the LearnerRecord _training_anchor_meta.caveats sidecar field. This is the AA-019-analog discipline for elliptic curves: explicit conditionality is metadata, not silently absorbed into the decidable routing.

high_value_items_present_notes.bsd_conditional_caveat_preserved: AA-019-analog discipline: trust_tier=numerically_certified routes to promoted but the BSD-conditional caveat survives in sidecar.caveats for downstream second-gating
high_value_items_present_notes.aa_013_smoke_test_readiness: Fixture from 2026-05-13 still exists at ergon/learner/fixtures/smoke_tests/aa_013_tensor_rank_routing.json; persisted artifact unaffected by today's ingest
high_value_items_present_notes.aa_013_anti_anchor_in_todays_batch: FALSE — today's batch is EC rank only; AA-013 was yesterday's batch (anti_anchor.jsonl is empty today)
high_value_items_present_notes.second_coefficient_positivity_obstructio: FALSE — today's batch has no primitive_proposal entries

behavior_delta_observed: Second end-to-end substrate-shaped-pipeline-to-Learner-corpus round-trip succeeded on consecutive days. Today's 2 EC-rank training_anchor blocks ingested with correct trust-tier-aware routing (both analytically_proven and numerically_certified → promoted/decidable, complementary to yesterday's ml_predicted → survived/conditional path). The substrate-shaped pipeline thesis now has a second concrete instance, with the trust-tier-discipline matrix exercised more completely (high-trust path today; ml_predicted/conditional path yesterday). Caveat-preservation discipline confirmed: BSD-conditional language in anchor-ec_rank-002 survives intact in the LearnerRecord sidecar, available for downstream second-gating without modifying trust_tier routing.

behavior_delta_status._note: Per Aporia 2026-05-13 template + P2 ticket value-advancement rule. 'fixture_created' requires both ≥1 LearnerRecord landed AND AA-013 fixture exists at named path. 'eval_run' and 'eval_passed' gated on Learner head existing — paused per substrate-first stand-down.

notes: Wrapped-shape unwrap fix from 2026-05-13 worked without modification on today's batch — same Techne stager envelope. No ingester code changes needed today.

Cumulative state across 2 days: 4 LearnerRecords in tier_pending (2 in 2026-05-13/under_threshold, 2 in 2026-05-14/under_threshold), all below v1.0 inclusion threshold. Below-threshold-but-substrate-grade pattern holds: each batch is a smoke-test, not a corpus contribution; corpus accumulation gated on volume scaling at the substrate-shaped pipeline.

Track 2 (P vs NP anti_anchor ingest) gated on Techne registration with AA-NNN ids; not executed today. AA-XXX placeholders still present in aporia/docs/staged_substrate_blocks/2026-05-14/validated_reauthored.jsonl. Pickup tomorrow if Techne files the registration ticket.
Today's exercise of analytically_proven + numerically_certified path complements yesterday's ml_predicted path — full trust-tier matrix now exercised at least once in production.
deferred_concerns: AA-019-analog vs explicit-anti-anchor: the BSD-conditional caveat on anchor-ec_rank-002 functions like AA-019 functioned for GL(3) Maass forms (ml_predicted carries explicit warning), but no formal anti_anchor exists pinning 'BSD-conditional rank rules CANNOT be used as unconditional ground truth'. Consider proposing such an anti_anchor (e.g. BSD_CONDITIONAL_RANK_ML_PREDICTED_VS_UNCONDITIONAL_DESCENT) for the next Aporia anti_anchor authoring cycle — would mirror AA-019's threat-vectors/mitigation pattern. Does NOT block today's ingest.
Track 2 P vs NP anti_anchor ingest pending Techne AA-NNN id registration — picks up tomorrow if registration ticket lands.
